docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED JAN-28-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORCHID, SAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-09-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-09-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SAM ORCHID. DEFENDANT BEATRICE ORCHID NOT PRESENT (DECEASED). DEFENDANT GARY ORCHID NOT PRESENT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO DEFT. - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO BEATRICE ORCHID, AND SAM ORCHID BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-09-2011 AT 1:30PM.

RETURNED MAIL SENT TO DEFT. -NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
